channel.title: Persona 4 on Dave Voyles
channel.description: Recent content in Persona 4 on Dave Voyles

item.title: After 10 months, I've finished Persona 4 — A game you should all experience.
item.description: 10 months. 80 hours. That’s how long it took me to play through Persona 4, and with my severe video game ADHD, if I play anything for more than a night, then that’s an accomplishment.  Well, it really took a bit more than that, because I earned all 3 endings and died a few times, but we’ll go with the official game time of 8o hours.  The last time I put this much time into a game was Dragon Quest VIII on the PS2, and Final Fantasy VII on the PS1.
